Package org.apache.juneau.bean.hal

package org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
Overview

HAL is a JSON-based hypermedia format used by RESTful APIs to express links and embedded resources alongside the payload itself. This module provides typed Juneau beans modeling the HAL wire format — no marshaller is needed; the existing JsonSerializer / JsonParser already produce and consume application/hal+json. The matching ContentType constant is org.apache.juneau.http.header.ContentType#APPLICATION_HAL_JSON (in juneau-rest-common).

Bean Classes
  • HalResource - Top-level HAL resource. Carries _links, _embedded, and arbitrary payload fields.
  • HalLink - HAL Link Object with the 8 spec fields.
  • HalLinkArray - LinkedList&lt;HalLink&gt; used as the multi-link branch inside an _links map.
  • HalResourceArray - LinkedList&lt;HalResource&gt; used as the multi-resource branch inside an _embedded map.
  • HalLinkOrArraySwap - ObjectSwap that materializes each _links value as either a single HalLink (JSON object) or a HalLinkArray (JSON array) per spec.
  • HalResourceOrArraySwap - The _embedded analogue.
Example

// Build a HAL resource with a self link, a curies array, and embedded items. HalResource order = new HalResource() .addLink("self", new HalLink().setHref("/orders/123")) .addLinks("curies", new HalLink().setName("acme").setHref("https://acme.example/{rel}").setTemplated(true)) .set("total", 99.50); String json = JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.serialize(order); HalResource back = JsonParser.DEFAULT.parse(json, HalResource.class);

See Also:

  • juneau-bean-hal
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.bean
    Data Transfer Objects
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    HalLink
    Represents a HAL Link Object as defined by draft-kelly-json-hal-08 § 5.
    HalLinkArray
    Represents a list of HalLink objects.
    HalLinkOrArraySwap
    Per-property ObjectSwap applied to HAL _links maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a single HalLink (JSON object) or a HalLinkArray (JSON array) per the spec.
    HalResource
    Represents a HAL Resource Object as defined by draft-kelly-json-hal-08 § 4.
    HalResourceArray
    Represents a list of HalResource objects.
    HalResourceOrArraySwap
    Per-property ObjectSwap applied to HAL _embedded maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a single HalResource (JSON object) or a HalResourceArray (JSON array) per the spec.
